nameMeanings.name: Drake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

variants.name: Duck
meanings: Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as an equivalent of Lohan (an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Leocháin ‘descendant of Leochán’) by mistranslation, as if from lacha ‘duck’.
North German (also Dück) and German (Dück): see Dueck .

variants.name: Drakes
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Drake was born on 29 May 1460, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Drake, was 20 and his mother, Joan Mulaine, was 20. He married Agnes Boteler in 1510, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 November 1541, in White Notley, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in White Notley, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Drake est né le 29 mai 1460, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Drake, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Mulaine, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Boteler en 1510, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 novembre 1541, à White Notley, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à White Notley, Essex, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Drake è nato il il 29 maggio 1460 nel Great Waltham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Drake, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Mulaine, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Boteler nel 1510, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 novembre 1541, nel White Notley, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a White Notley, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Drakeが1460年5月29日にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父William Drakeは20歳，母Joan Mulaineは20歳であった。1510年にイギリスエセックスでAgnes Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1541年11月27日にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーで81歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter, Walworth, Southwark, London, E: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 소우스워크 월워스 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Drake(이)가 1460년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Drake(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Mulaine(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1510년 영국 에세스에서 Agnes Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 11월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 휘트 노틀리에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 휘트 노틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Drake nasceu em 29 de maio de 1460, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Drake, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Mulaine, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Boteler em 1510, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1541, em White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter, Walworth, Southwark, London, E: ст питир, валворт, соутварк, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Drake родился 29 мая 1460 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Drake было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Mulaine, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Boteler в 1510 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 ноября 1541 г. в местности уит нотли, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности уит нотли, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Drake nació el 29 de mayo de 1460, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Drake, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Mulaine, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes Boteler en 1510, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1541, en White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en White Notley, Essex, Inglaterra.
